title: Getting Started with Static HTML
excerpt: Learn the fundamentals of HTML5 and build your first static website from scratch with best practices and semantic markup.
description: A comprehensive guide to HTML5 fundamentals, semantic markup, accessibility, and best practices for building modern static websites.
author: Soeraj Balak
content:
# Getting Started with Static HTML

HTML is the foundation of web development. This guide covers HTML5 fundamentals including semantic elements, form handling, and accessibility best practices.

title: Modern CSS Layout Techniques
excerpt: Explore Flexbox and CSS Grid to create responsive, flexible layouts without relying on frameworks.
description: Master modern CSS layout techniques including Flexbox, CSS Grid, positioning, and responsive design patterns for building flexible layouts.
author: Soeraj Balak
content:
# Modern CSS Layout Techniques

Flexbox and CSS Grid have revolutionized web layout. Learn how to use these powerful tools to create responsive and flexible layouts without external frameworks.

title: JavaScript Fundamentals for Web Development
excerpt: Master core JavaScript concepts including functions, async/await, DOM manipulation, and modern ES6+ syntax.
description: A practical guide to JavaScript fundamentals covering functions, asynchronous programming, DOM manipulation, and ES6+ features essential for modern web development.
author: Soeraj Balak
content:
# JavaScript Fundamentals

JavaScript powers interactive web experiences. This guide covers essential concepts for modern web development.

title: Building APIs with Node.js and Express
excerpt: Learn to design and implement RESTful APIs using Node.js and Express with proper error handling, validation, and security.
description: A comprehensive guide to building production-ready APIs with Node.js and Express, covering REST principles, error handling, authentication, and security best practices.
author: Soeraj Balak
content:
# Building APIs with Node.js and Express

Express makes building robust APIs straightforward. Learn REST principles and best practices for production APIs.

title: Web Security Best Practices for Developers
excerpt: Essential security practices including HTTPS, input validation, authentication, authorization, and protection against common vulnerabilities.
description: A developer's guide to web security covering HTTPS, input validation, secure authentication and authorization, CSRF protection, and defense against common attacks.
author: Soeraj Balak
content:
# Web Security Best Practices

Security is critical for modern web applications. Learn essential practices to protect your users and data.
